meta.title: Mateo Cordier
meta.description: Websites and AI videos. Out of Lyon.

notes.intro: I'm Mateo. I build websites and make AI videos, based in Lyon, France. Usually for brands that want something that doesn't look like a template. Also for my own projects — Surge, RÉSERVE.
notes.invite: Make yourself at home, open the folders, watch the videos. If you want to chat, Mail.app is in the dock — I answer fast, promise.

mail.title: Mail
mail.name: Name
mail.sent: Message ready — your mail client should open.

autoPlay.text: Hey! I saw your portfolio — really clean work.
Thanks! What would you like to know?
Tell me about yourself — what do you do exactly?
I'm a freelance web developer and marketing strategist based in Lyon, France. I build high-converting websites and run digital campaigns for SMBs and creators through my agency, Surge.
That's cool. What tools do you work with?
Next.js, React, Tailwind for the build. Figma for design. For marketing — Meta Ads, Google Ads, email sequences, SEO. I also use AI tools like Higgsfield for motion content.

round1.question: What projects are you most proud of?
round1.answer: Body & Spirit is a highlight — a full brand and website for a wellness studio. RÉSERVE is my own hospitality concept. And Surge, my agency, is probably where I'm most invested right now.

round1.question: Do you work with international clients?
round1.answer: Absolutely. I'm bilingual FR/EN and fully remote-ready. I've worked with clients in Montreal and across Europe — time zones aren't a barrier.

round1.question: What's your availability?
round1.answer: I'm currently taking on new projects. Typical turnaround depends on scope — a landing page can be a week, a full site with strategy is 4–6 weeks.

round1.question: How did you build this portfolio?
round1.answer: It's a macOS desktop concept built in Next.js with Framer Motion for the animations. I built it in about a week using Claude Code as an AI accelerator — the whole thing is a bit of a flex.

round2.question: What are your rates?
round2.answer: I work project-based, not hourly. A typical project starts around €2–3K for a landing page and goes up from there. Let's jump on a discovery call — I can give you a proper estimate in 30 min.

round2.question: Where can I reach you?
round2.answer: Best way is email: mateo.cordier@gmail.com. Or find me on LinkedIn. I usually reply within a few hours.

round2.question: What's next for you?
round2.answer: Growing Surge, shipping more ambitious web projects, and exploring AI-native products. I'm drawn to founders and studios who want to move fast and build something real.
